name: Variance Calculator
desc: Variance Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Use our free variance calculator to quickly estimate varianza_poblacion, varianza_muestra based on v1, v2, v3. No registration needed.
result_context: The variance mide The average of The cuadrados of The desviaciones respecto a The mean.
formula_display: S² = Σ(xᵢ - x̄)² / (n-1) (muestra) or Σ(xᵢ - x̄)² / n (población)
steps: Subtract The mean a each value
Elevar each diferencia to the square
Add and Divide between n-1 or n
mistakes: Confusing variance of muestra vs población
